Blessed Strikes: Potent Spellcasting.name: Blessed Strikes: Potent Spellcasting
Blessed Strikes: Potent Spellcasting.description:
Add your Wisdom modifier to the damage you deal with any Cleric cantrip.

Nota do Foundry

This bonus damage is not automatically included in your cantrips.

You can add [[lookup @abilities.wis.mod]] to the Situational Bonus field of your cantrip's damage rolls or you can permanently add it to your cantrips by adding "@abilities.wis.mod" (minus the quotes) in the Bonus field.

Alternatively, the Damage activity on this feature includes your Wisdom modifier and allows you to choose the damage type in the roll's dialog box.

Divine Order: Protector.name: Ordem Divina: Protetor
Divine Order: Protector.description:
Você se dedicou à seguinte função sagrada:

Protetor. Treinado para a batalha, você ganha proficiência com armas marciais e treinamento com armaduras pesadas.

Nota do Foundry

Essa característica inclui um Efeito Ativo que concede a proficiência e o treinamento.

Divine Order: Thaumaturge.name: Ordem Divina: Taumaturgo
Divine Order: Thaumaturge.description:
Você se dedicou à seguinte função sagrada:

Taumaturgo. Você conhece um truque extra da @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.SkHptN2PTzFGDaEj]{Lista de magias do clérigo}. Além disso, sua conexão mística com o divino lhe dá um bônus nos seus testes de Inteligência (Aracanismo e Religião). O bônus é igual ao seu modificador de Sbedoria (mínimo de +1, atualmente [[lookup @abilities.wis.mod]]).

Nota do Foundry

Essa característica inclui um Efeito Ativo que aumenta o número de magias básicas que você pode conhecer e concede um bônus aos seus testes de Inteligência (Arcanismo ou Religião).

Blessed Strikes: Divine Strike.name: Blessed Strikes: Divine Strike
Blessed Strikes: Divine Strike.description:
Once on each of your turns when you hit a creature with an attack roll using a weapon, you can cause the target to take an extra 1d8 Necrotic or Radiant damage (your choice).

Nota do Foundry

This feature's damage will automatically increase when you gain @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.classes24.Item.phbclcImprovedBl]{Improved Blessed Strikes}.

Elemental Fury: Potent Spellcasting.name: Elemental Fury: Potent Spellcasting
Elemental Fury: Potent Spellcasting.description:
Add your Wisdom modifier to the damage you deal with any Druid cantrip (currently, [[lookup @abilities.wis.mod]]).

Nota do Foundry

This feature does not automate the addition of the Wisdom modifier to Druid cantrips.

Elemental Fury: Primal Strike.name: Elemental Fury: Primal Strike
Elemental Fury: Primal Strike.description:
Once on each of your turns when you hit a creature with an attack roll using a weapon or a Beast form's attack in Wild Shape, you can cause the target to take an extra 1d8 [[/damage 1d8 type=cold]]{cold}, [[/damage 1d8 type=fire]]{fire}, [[/damage 1d8 type=lightning]]{lightning}, or [[/damage 1d8 type=thunder]]{thunder} damage (choose when you hit).

Nota do Foundry

This feature's damage will automatically increase when you gain @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.classes24.Item.phbdrdImprovedEl]{Improved Elemental Fury}. If using the activity you will be able to select the damage type when rolling. It will default to your previously chosen damage type.

Primal Order: Magician.name: Primal Order: Magician
Primal Order: Magician.description:
You know one extra cantrip from the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.LhvuDQEyrCdg5EfU#cantrip]{Lista de magias do druida}. In addition, your mystical connection to nature gives you a bonus to your Intelligence (Arcana or Nature) checks. The bonus equals your Wisdom modifier (minimum bonus of +1, currently [[lookup @abilities.wis.mod]]).

Nota do Foundry

This feature includes an Active Effect which automates the increase to your known cantrips and the bonus to your Arcane and Nature checks.

Primal Order: Warden.name: Ordem Primordial: Guarda
Primal Order: Warden.description:
Treinado para a batalha, você adquire proficiência com armas Marciais e treinamento com armadura Média.

Nota do Foundry

This feature includes an Active Effect which automates the addition of your Martial weapons proficiency and Medium armor training.

Barbarian.name: Bárbaro
Barbarian.description:
Traços Principais de Bárbaro

Atributo Primário

Força

Dado de Vida

D12 por nível de Bárbaro

Proficiências em Salvaguardas

Força e Constituição

Proficiências em Perícias

Escolha 2: Lidar com Animais, Atletismo, Intimidação, Natureza, Percepção ou Sobrevivência

Proficiências com Armas

Simple and Martial weapons

Treinamento com Armadura

Armaduras leves e médias, escudos

Equipamento inicial

Escolha A ou B: (A) @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbwepGreataxe00]{Machado Grande}, 4 @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbwepHandaxe000]{Machadinhas}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbagExplorersPa]{Kit de Explorador} e [[/award 15GP]]; ou (B) [[/award 75GP]]

@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbAppendixClass.JournalEntryPage.phbbrbBarbarian0 inline classes="free-rules-embed"]

Tornando-se um bárbaro …

Como um Personagem de 1º Nível

  • Ganhe todos os traços na tabela Traços Principais do Bárbaro.
  • Ganhe as características de 1º nível, listadas na tabela Características do Bárbaro.

Como um Personagem Multiclasse

  • Ganhe os seguintes traços da tabela Traços Principais do Bárbaro: Dado de vida, proficiência com armas marciais e treinamento com escudos.
  • Ganhe as características de 1º nível, listadas na tabela Características do Bárbaro.

Path of the Berserker.name: Path of the Berserker
Path of the Berserker.description:
Channel Rage into Violent Fury

Barbarians who walk the Path of the Berserker direct their Rage primarily toward violence. Their path is one of untrammeled fury, and they thrill in the chaos of battle as they allow their Rage to seize and empower them.

Brutal Strike.name: Brutal Strike
Brutal Strike.description:
If you use [[/item Reckless Attack]], you can forgo any Advantage on one Strength-based attack roll of your choice on your turn. The chosen attack roll mustn't have Disadvantage. If the chosen attack roll hits, the target takes an extra [[lookup @scale.barbarian.brutal-strike]] damage of the same type dealt by the weapon or Unarmed Strike, and you can cause one Brutal Strike effect of your choice. You have the following effect options.

Forceful Blow. The target is pushed 15 feet straight away from you. You can then move up to half your Speed straight toward the target without provoking &Reference[Opportunity Attacks].

Hamstring Blow. The target's Speed is reduced by 15 feet until the start of your next turn. A target can be affected by only one Hamstring Blow at a time - the most recent one.

Nota do Foundry

This feature includes an Active Effect for the Hamstring Blow which can be applied to a target.

The damage activity automatically scales when you gain Improved Brutal Strike (2).

Hamstrung.name: Hamstrung
Hamstrung.description: Hit by a hamstring blow, this character's Speed has been reduced by 15 feet until the start of the attacker's next turn.

Danger Sense.name: Danger Sense
Danger Sense.description:
You gain an uncanny sense of when things aren't as they should be, giving you an edge when you dodge perils. You have Advantage on Dexterity saving throws unless you have the &Reference[Incapacitated] condition.

Nota do Foundry

This feature automates the Advantage on Dexterity saving throws but is not automatically disabled when Incapacitated. It can be temporarily deactivated in the Effects tab.

Danger Sense.name: Danger Sense
Danger Sense.description: You have Advantage on Dexterity saving throws unless you have the &Reference[Incapacitated] condition.

Epic Boon.name: Epic Boon
Epic Boon.description:
You gain an @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbFeats00000000.JournalEntryPage.GxfrwkJbrIvn7reC]{Epic Boon feat} or another feat of your choice for which you qualify. @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.feats24.Item.phbBoonofSpellRe]{Boon of Spell Recall} é recomendado.

Nota do Foundry

You will be prompted for a choice while leveling up.

Extra Attack.name: Extra Attack
Extra Attack.description: You can attack twice instead of once whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

Fast Movement.name: Fast Movement
Fast Movement.description:
Your speed increases by 10 feet while you aren't wearing Heavy armor.

Nota do Foundry

This feature includes an Active Effect which will automatically increase your movement speed. Disable the Fast Movement Active Effect if you're wearing Heavy armor.

Feral Instinct.name: Feral Instinct
Feral Instinct.description: Your instincts are so honed that you have Advantage on Initiative rolls.

Frenzy.name: Frenzy
Frenzy.description:
If you use Reckless Attack while your Rage is active, you deal extra damage to the first target you hit on your turn with a Strength-based attack. To determine the extra damage, roll a number of d6s equal to your Rage Damage bonus, and add them together. The damage has the same type as the weapon or Unarmed Strike used for the attack.

Nota do Foundry

The Damage activity scales automatically as you level up and allows you to select the type of damage to use in the damage roll's dialog box. It will then remember your choice going forward.

Improved Brutal Strike (2).name: Improved Brutal Strike (2)
Improved Brutal Strike (2).description:
The extra damage of your Brutal Strike increases to 2d10. In addition, you can use two different Brutal Strike effects whenever you use your Brutal Strike feature.

Nota do Foundry

The damage roll in Brutal Strike will automatically scale to use this new value.

Improved Brutal Strike.name: Improved Brutal Strike
Improved Brutal Strike.description:
You have honed new ways to attack furiously. The following effects are now among your Brutal Strike options.

Staggering Blow. The target has Disadvantage on the next saving throw it makes, and it can't make Opportunity Attacks until the start of your next turn.

Sundering Blow. Before the start of your next turn, the next attack roll made by another creature against the target gains a +5 bonus to the roll. An attack roll can gain only one Sundering Blow bonus.

Nota do Foundry

This feature includes an activity for each option which includes an Active Effect for tracking the Staggering and Sundering Blows but does not automate their effects.

Staggered.name: Staggered
Staggered.description: Hit by a staggering blow, this character has Disadvantage on the next Saving Throw it makes, and it can't make Opportunity Attacks until the start of the attacker's next turn.

Sundered.name: Sundered
Sundered.description: Hit by a sundering blow, the next attack roll made by another creature against the target gains a +5 bonus to the roll.

Indomitable Might.name: Indomitable Might
Indomitable Might.description: If your total for a Strength check or Strength saving throw is less than your Strength score, you can use that score in place of the total.

Instinctive Pounce.name: Instinctive Pounce
Instinctive Pounce.description: As part of the Bonus Action you take to enter your Rage, you can move up to half your Speed.

Intimidating Presence.name: Intimidating Presence
Intimidating Presence.description:
As a Bonus Action, you can strike terror into others with your menacing presence and primal power. When you do so, each creature of your choice in a 30-foot Emanation originating from you must make a Wisdom saving throw (DC 8 plus your Strength modifier and Proficiency Bonus). On a failed save, a creature has the Frightened condition for 1 minute. At the end of each of the &Reference[Frightened] creature's turns, the creature repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success.

Once you use this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a Long Rest unless you expend a use of your Rage (no action required) to restore your use of it.

Nota do Foundry

The Save activity includes an Active Effect which adds the Frightened condition.

The Recharge activity consumes a use of Rage and recharges your use of Intimidating Presence.

Mindless Rage.name: Mindless Rage
Mindless Rage.description:
You have Immunity to the &Reference[Charmed] and &Reference[Frightened] conditions while your Rage is active. If you're Charmed or Frightened when you enter your Rage, the condition ends on you.

Nota do Foundry

This feature includes an Active Effect which grants the Charmed and Frightened condition immunity. It is not applied automatically when you begin your Rage though.

Persistent Rage.name: Persistent Rage
Persistent Rage.description:
When you roll Initiative, you can regain all expended uses of Rage. After you regain uses of Rage in this way, you can't do so again until you finish a Long Rest.

In addition, your Rage is so fierce that it now lasts for 10 minutes without you needing to do anything to extend it from round to round. Your Rage ends early if you have the &Reference[Unconscious] condition (not just the &Reference[Incapacitated] condition) or don Heavy armor.

Nota do Foundry

This feature includes an activity which can be used when you roll Initiative which will recharge all of your Rage uses.

Primal Champion.name: Primal Champion
Primal Champion.description: You embody primal power. Your Strength and Constitution scores increase by 4, to a maximum of 25.

Primal Knowledge.name: Primal Knowledge
Primal Knowledge.description:
You gain proficiency in another skill of your choice from the skill list available to Barbarians at level 1.

In addition, while your Rage is active, you can channel primal power when you attempt certain tasks; whenever you make an ability check using one of the following skills, you can make it as a Strength check even if it normally uses a different ability: Acrobatics, Intimidation, Perception, Stealth, or Survival. When you use this ability, your Strength represents primal power coursing through you, honing your agility, bearing, and senses.

Nota do Foundry

This feature includes an Active Effect which will cause those skills to automatically use your Strength modifier if it is higher than the normal Ability Score associated with the Skill.

Rage.name: Fúria
Rage.description:
Você pode entrar em Fúria, um poder primordial que lhe concede força e resiliência extraordinárias. Você pode ativá-la como uma ação bônus se não estiver usando armadura pesada.

Você pode entrar em Fúria o número de vezes indicado na coluna Fúrias da tabela Características de Bárbaro para seu nível de Bárbaro (atualmente [[lookup @scale.barbarian.rages]]). Você recupera um uso gasto ao completar um Descanso Curto e restaura todos os usos gastos ao completar um Descanso Longo.

Resistência a Dano. Você tem Resistência a dano Contundente, Cortante e Perfurante.

Dano da Fúria. Ao realizar um ataque com Força — seja com uma arma ou um Ataque Desarmado — e causar dano ao alvo, você recebe um bônus no dano, que aumenta conforme você adquire níveis como Bárbaro, conforme mostrado na coluna Dano da Fúria da tabela Características de Bárbaro.

Strength Advantage. Você tem Vantagem em testes de Força e salvaguardas de Força.

Sem Concentração ou Magias. Você não pode manter a Concentração e não pode conjurar magias.

Duração. A Fúria dura até o final do seu próximo turno, e encerra se você vestir armadura Pesada ou ter a condição Incapacitado. Se sua Fúria ainda estiver ativa no próximo turno, você pode estendê-la por mais um turno ao realizar uma das seguintes ações:

  • Realizar uma jogada de ataque contra um inimigo.
  • Forçar um inimigo a realizar uma salvaguarda.
  • Executar uma Ação Bônus para estender sua Fúria.

Cada vez que a Fúria é estendida, ela permanece até o final do seu próximo turno. Você pode manter uma Fúria por até 10 minutos.

Nota do Foundry

Essa habilidade inclui um Efeito Ativo que automatiza a Resistência e o dano adicional. Além disso, ela recarrega automaticamente suas utilizações de Fúria durante um Descanso Curto e um Descanso Longo.

Reckless Attack.name: Reckless Attack
Reckless Attack.description:
You can throw aside all concern for defense to attack with increased ferocity. When you make your first attack roll on your turn, you can decide to attack recklessly. Doing so gives you Advantage on attack rolls using Strength until the start of your next turn, but attack rolls against you have Advantage during that time.

Nota do Foundry

This feature includes an Active Effect for tracking whether you are reckless or not but it does not automate Advantage on your attacks or attacks against you.

Relentless Rage.name: Relentless Rage
Relentless Rage.description:
Your Rage can keep you fighting despite grievous wounds. If you drop to 0 Hit Points while your Rage is active and don't die outright, you can make a DC 10 Constitution saving throw. If you succeed, your Hit Points instead change to a number equal to twice your Barbarian level.

Each time you use this feature after the first, the DC increases by 5. When you finish a Short or Long Rest, the DC resets to 10.

Nota do Foundry

This feature will automatically increase the DC by 5 if you consume the resource when activating it. It will also automatically reset to 10 after a Short or Long Rest.

Retaliation.name: Retaliation
Retaliation.description: When you take damage from a creature that is within 5 feet of you, you can take a Reaction to make one melee attack against that creature, using a weapon or an Unarmed Strike.

Unarmed Strike.name: Ataque Desarmado
Unarmed Strike.description:
You can use Dexterity instead of Strength for the attack and damage rolls of your &Reference[Unarmed Strike]{unarmed strikes}. You can roll your Martial Arts die in place of the normal damage.

See: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.classes24.Item.phbmnkMartialArt]{Martial Arts (Monk)}

Unarmored Defense.name: Defesa sem Armadura
Unarmored Defense.description:
Enquanto você não estiver vestindo armadura ou empunhando um Escudo, sua Classe de Armadura base é igual a 10 mais seus modificadores de Destreza e Sabedoria.

Nota do Foundry

Essa habilidade inclui um Efeito Ativo que atualiza sua Classe de Armadura.

Weapon Mastery.name: Maestria com Armas
Weapon Mastery.description:
Seu treinamento com armas permite que você use as propriedades de maestria de dois tipos de armas à sua escolha com as quais você tem proficiência, como Arcos Longos e Espadas Curtas.

Sempre que completar um Descanso Longo, você pode alterar os tipos de armas que escolheu. Por exemplo, você pode mudar para usar as propriedades de maestria de Cimitarras e Espadas Longas.

Bard.name: Bardo
Bard.description:
Traços Principais do Bardo

Atributo Primário

Carisma

Dado de Vida

D8 por nível de bardo

Proficiências em Salvaguardas

Destreza e Carisma

Proficiências em Perícias

Escolha 3 perícias quaisquer

Proficiências com Armas

Armas simples

Proficiências com Ferramentas

Escolha 3 instrumentos musicais

Treinamento com Armadura

Armaduras leves

Equipamento inicial

Escolha A ou B: (A) @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbarmLeatherArm]{Armadura de Couro}, 2 @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbwepDagger0000]{Adagas}, um instrumento musical à sua escolha, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbagEntertainer]{kit de artista} e [[/award 19gp]]; ou (B) [[/award 90GP]]

@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbAppendixClass.JournalEntryPage.phbbrdBard000000 inline classes="free-rules-embed"]

Tornando-se um bardo...

Como um Personagem de 1º Nível

  • Ganhe todos os traços da tabela Traços Principais do Bardo.
  • Ganhe as características de 1º nível, listadas na tabela Características do Bardo.

Como um Personagem Multiclasse

  • Ganhe os seguintes traços da tabela Traços Principais do Bardo: dado de vida, proficiência em uma perícia à sua escolha, proficiência em um instrumento musical à sua escolha e treinamento com armaduras leves.
  • Ganhe as características de 1º nível, listadas na tabela Características do Bardo. Veja as regras de multiclasse no capítulo 2 para determinar seus espaços de magia disponíveis.

Bardic Inspiration.name: Inspiração de Bardo
Bardic Inspiration.description:
Você pode inspirar outros sobrenaturalmente por meio de palavras, música ou dança. Essa inspiração é representada pelo seu dado de Inspiração de Bardo, que começa como um d6. (atualmente, [[lookup @scale.bard.inspiration.die]]).

Usando Inspiração de Bardo. Como uma Ação Bônus, você pode inspirar outra criatura a até 18 metros de você que possa vê-lo ou ouvi-lo. Essa criatura recebe um de seus dados de Inspiração de Bardo. Uma criatura pode ter apenas um dado de Inspiração de Bardo de cada vez.

Uma vez, dentro da próxima uma hora, após a criatura falhar em um Teste de D20, ela pode jogar o dado de Inspiração de Bardo e adicionar o resultado ao D20, transformando potencialmente a falha em sucesso. O dado de Inspiração de Bardo é gasto quando for jogado.

Número de Usos. Você pode conceder um dado de Inspiração de Bardo um número de vezes igual ao seu modificador de Carisma (mínimo de uma vez), e você restaura todos os usos gastos ao completar um Descanso Longo.

Em Níveis Mais Altos. Seu dado de Inspiração de Bardo muda ao atingir certos níveis de Bardo, conforme mostrado na coluna Dados de Inspiração da tabela Características de Bardo. O dado se torna um d8 no nível 5, um d10 no nível 10 e um d12 no nível 15.

Nota do Foundry

Esse recurso inclui um Efeito Ativo para monitorar quando um personagem tem Inspiração de Bardo disponível para usar.

A recuperação está definida para descanso longo (para níveis anteriores ao ganho de @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.classes24.Item.phbbrdFontOfInsp]{Fonte de Inspiração}). Ajuste manualmente conforme necessário.

Inspired.name: Inspirado
Inspired.description: Você recebeu Inspiração de Bardo. Uma vez, dentro da próxima uma hora, se você falhar em um teste de d20, você pode jogar o dado de Inspiração de Bardo e adicionar o resultado ao d20, transformando potencialmente a falha em sucesso. O dado de Inspiração de Bardo é gasto após ser jogado.

Bonus Proficiencies.name: Bonus Proficiencies
Bonus Proficiencies.description: You gain proficiency with three skills of your choice.

Countercharm.name: Countercharm
Countercharm.description: You can use musical notes or words of power to disrupt mind-influencing effects. If you or a creature within 30 feet of you fails a saving throw against an effect that applies the Charmed or Frightened condition, you can take a Reaction to cause the save to be rerolled, and the new roll has Advantage.

Cutting Words.name: Cutting Words
Cutting Words.description: You learn to use your wit to supernaturally distract, confuse, and otherwise sap the confidence and competence of others. When a creature that you can see within 60 feet of yourself makes a damage roll or succeeds on an ability check or attack roll, you can take a Reaction to expend one use of your Bardic Inspiration; roll your Bardic Inspiration die, and subtract the number rolled from the creature's roll, reducing the damage or potentially turning the success into a failure.

Expertise.name: Especialista
Expertise.description:
Choose two of your skill proficiencies with which you lack Expertise. You gain Expertise in those skills.

Nota do Foundry

You will be prompted with a choice when you reach this level.

Font of Inspiration.name: Font of Inspiration
Font of Inspiration.description:
You now regain all your expended uses of Bardic Inspiration when you finish a Short or Long Rest.

In addition, you can expend a spell slot (no action required) to regain one expended use of Bardic Inspiration.

Nota do Foundry

You must update the Bardic Inspiration feature on your sheet to refresh on Short Rest as it defaults to Long rest.

The Recharge with Spell Slot activity will expend a spell slot and grant another use of Bardic Inspiration.

Jack of All Trades.name: Jack of All Trades
Jack of All Trades.description:
You can add half your Proficiency Bonus (round down) to any ability check you make that uses a skill proficiency you lack and that doesn't otherwise use your Proficiency Bonus.

For example, if you make a Strength (Athletics) check and lack Athletics proficiency, you can add half your Proficiency Bonus to the check.

Nota do Foundry

This feature includes an Active Effect which will automatically grant you half proficiency for all skills which you aren't currently proficient in.

College of Lore.name: College of Lore
College of Lore.description:
Plumb the Depths of Magical Knowledge

Bards of the College of Lore collect spells and secrets from diverse sources, such as scholarly tomes, mystical rites, and peasant tales. The college's members gather in libraries and universities to share their lore with one another. They also meet at festivals or affairs of state, where they can expose corruption, unravel lies, and poke fun at self-important figures of authority.

Magical Discoveries.name: Magical Discoveries
Magical Discoveries.description:
You learn two spells of your choice. These spells can come from the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.SkHptN2PTzFGDaEj]{Clérigo}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.LhvuDQEyrCdg5EfU]{Druida} ou @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.6AnqLUowgdsqMFvz]{Mago} spell list or any combination thereof. A spell you choose must be a cantrip or a spell for which you have spell slots, as shown in the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbBard000000000.JournalEntryPage.V8pqIWlaL9GhY61t#equipment]{Bard Features} table.

You always have the chosen spells prepared, and whenever you gain a Bard level, you can replace one of the spells with another spell that meets these requirements.

Magical Secrets.name: Magical Secrets
Magical Secrets.description: You've learned secrets from various magical traditions. Whenever you reach a Bard level (including this level) and the Prepared Spells number in the Bard Features table increases, you can choose any of your new prepared spells from the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.wwia6Wwo4BgE9GSI]{Bard}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.SkHptN2PTzFGDaEj]{Clérigo}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.LhvuDQEyrCdg5EfU]{Druida} e @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.6AnqLUowgdsqMFvz]{Mago} spell lists, and the chosen spells count as Bard spells for you. In addition, whenever you replace a spell prepared for this class, you can replace it with a spell from those lists.

Peerless Skill.name: Peerless Skill
Peerless Skill.description: When you make an ability check or attack roll and fail, you can expend one use of Bardic Inspiration; roll the Bardic Inspiration die, and add the number rolled to the d20, potentially turning a failure into a success. On a failure, the Bardic Inspiration isn't expended.

Spellcasting.name: Conjuração
Spellcasting.description:
Como estudante de magia arcana, você aprendeu a conjurar magias. Veja @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.b2QVn25z2N1ykWpf]{regras de conjuração}. As informações abaixo detalham como você usa essas regras com magias de Mago, que aparecem na @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.6AnqLUowgdsqMFvz]{lista de magias do mago}.

Truques. Você conhece três truques de Mago à sua escolha. @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplLight00000]{luz}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplMageHand00]{mãos mágicas} e @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplRayofFrost]{raio de gelo} são recomendados. Ao completar um Descanso Longo, você pode substituir um dos seus truques dessa característica por outro truque de Mago à sua escolha.

Ao atingir os níveis 4 e 10 de Mago, você aprende mais um truque de Mago à sua escolha, conforme detalhado na coluna Truques da @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbWizard0000000.JournalEntryPage.g7cMRWzsgAsEF7zC#class-features]{tabela Características do Mago}.

Livro de Magias. Seu aprendizado de mago culminou na criação de um livro único: seu livro de magias. É um objeto Minúsculo que pesa 1,5 quilo, contém 100 páginas e pode ser lido apenas por você ou por alguém que conjure @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplIdentify00]{identificar}. Você determina a aparência e os materiais do livro, como um tomo com bordas douradas ou uma coleção de pergaminhos amarrados com barbante.

O livro contém as magias de 1º círculo ou superior que você conhece. Ele começa com seis magias de mago 1º círculo à sua escolha. @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDetectMagi]{Detectar Magia}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplFeatherFal]{Queda Suave}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplMageArmor0]{Armadura Arcana}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplMagicMissi]{Mísseis Mágicos}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplSleep00000]{Sono} e @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplThunderwav]{Onda Trovejante} são recomendados.

Ao atingir um nível de Mago após o primeiro, adicione duas magias de Mago à sua escolha ao seu livro de magias. Cada uma dessas magias deve ser de um círculo para o qual você tenha espaços de magia, conforme detalhado na tabela Características de Mago. As magias são o ponto culminante da pesquisa arcana que você faz regularmente.

Espaços de Magia. A tabela Características do Mago mostra quantos espaços de magia você tem para conjurar suas magias de 1º círculo ou superior. Você restaura todos os espaços gastos ao completar um Descanso Longo.

Magias Preparadas de 1º Círculo ou Maior. Você prepara a lista de magias de 1º círculo ou superior que estão disponíveis para você conjurar com esta característica. Para isso, escolha quatro magias do seu livro de magias. As magias escolhidas devem ser de um círculo para o qual você tenha espaços de magia.

O número de magias em sua lista aumenta à medida que você alcança níveis de Mago, conforme detalhado na coluna Magias Preparadas da tabela Características de Mago. Sempre que esse número aumentar, escolha magias adicionais de Mago até que o número de magias em sua lista corresponda ao número na tabela. As magias escolhidas devem ser de um círculo para o qual você possua espaços de magia. Por exemplo, se você é um Mago de 3º nível, sua lista de magias preparadas pode incluir seis magias de 1º ou 2º círculo em qualquer combinação, escolhidas do seu livro de magias.

Se outra característica de Mago lhe conceder magias que você sempre tem preparadas, essas magias não contam para o número de magias que você pode preparar com esta característica, mas essas magias, de outra forma, contam como magias de Mago para você.

Mudando Suas Magias Preparadas. Ao completar um Descanso Longo, você pode alterar sua lista de magias preparadas, substituindo qualquer uma das magias por outras do seu livro de magias.

Atributo de Conjuração. Inteligência é seu atributo de conjuração para suas magias de Mago.

Foco de Conjuração. Você pode usar um Foco Arcano ou seu livro de magias como um Foco de Conjuração para suas magias de Mago.

Superior Inspiration.name: Superior Inspiration
Superior Inspiration.description: When you roll Initiative, you regain expended uses of Bardic Inspiration until you have two if you have fewer than that.

Words of Creation.name: Words of Creation
Words of Creation.description:
You have mastered two of the Words of Creation: the words of life and death. You therefore always have the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplPowerWordH]{Power Word Heal} e @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplPowerWordK]{Power Word Kill} spells prepared. When you cast either spell, you can target a second creature with it if that creature is within 10 feet of the first target.

Nota do Foundry

You are automatically granted these spells as you level up.

Blessed Healer.name: Blessed Healer
Blessed Healer.description:
The healing spells you cast on others heal you as well. Immediately after you cast a spell with a spell slot that restores Hit Points to one or more creatures other than yourself, you regain Hit Points equal to 2 plus the spell slot's level.

Nota do Foundry

This feature includes a healing activity. Set the scale to the spell slot level you cast and it will provide a healing roll for you.

Blessed Strikes.name: Blessed Strikes
Blessed Strikes.description:
Divine power infuses you in battle. You gain one of the following options of your choice (if you get either option from a Cleric subclass in an older book, use only the option you choose for this feature).

Divine Strike. Once on each of your turns when you hit a creature with an attack roll using a weapon, you can cause the target to take an extra 1d8 Necrotic or Radiant damage (your choice).

Potent Spellcasting. Add your Wisdom modifier to the damage you deal with any Cleric cantrip.

Nota do Foundry

Ao avançar, você poderá escolher a opção de sua preferência.

Channel Divinity.name: Channel Divinity
Channel Divinity.description:
You can channel divine energy directly from the Outer Planes, using it to fuel magical effects. You start with one such effect: Divine Sense, which is described below. Other Paladin features give additional Channel Divinity effect options. Each time you use this class's Channel Divinity, you choose which effect from this class to create.

You can use this class's Channel Divinity twice. You regain one of its expended uses when you finish a Short Rest, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest. You gain an additional use when you reach Paladin level 11.

If a Channel Divinity effect requires a saving throw, the DC equals the spell save DC from this class's Spellcasting feature.

Divine Sense. As a Bonus Action, you can open your awareness to detect Celestials, Fiends, and Undead. For the next 10 minutes or until you have the Incapacitated condition, you know the location of any creature of those types within 60 feet of yourself, and you know its creature type. Within the same radius, you also detect the presence of any place or object that has been consecrated or desecrated, as with the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplHallow0000]{Hallow} spell.

Nota do Foundry

The uses of your Channel Divinity increase automatically as you level up. It automatically regains the correct uses after Short and Long Rests.

The Divine Sense activity includes an Active Effect but it does not automatically reveal the given creatures.

Cleric.name: Clérigo
Cleric.description:
Traços Principais do Clérigo

Atributo Primário

Sabedoria

Dado de Vida

D8 por nível de clérigo

Proficiência em Salvaguardas

Carisma, Sabedoria

Proficiências em Perícias

Escolha 2: História, Intuição, Medicina, Persuasão ou Religião

Proficiências com Armas

Armas simples

Treinamento com Armadura

Armaduras leves e médias, escudos

Equipamento Inicial

Escolha A ou B: (A) @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbarmChainShirt]{Cota de malha parcial}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbarmShield0000]{Escudo}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbwepMace000000]{Maça}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbagHolySymbolV]{Símbolo Sagrado}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbagPriestsPack]{Kit de Sacerdote} e [[/award 7GP]]; ou (B) [[/award 110GP]]

@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbAppendixClass.JournalEntryPage.phbclcCleric0000 inline classes="free-rules-embed"]

Tornando-se um clérigo

Como um Personagem de 1º Nível

  • Ganhe todos os traços da tabela Traços Principais do Clérigo.
  • Ganhe as características de 1º nível do Clérigo, listadas na tabela Características do Clérigo.

Como um Personagem Multiclasse

  • Ganhe os seguintes traços da tabela Traços Principais do Clérigo: dado de vida e treinamento com armaduras leves, médias e escudos.
  • Ganhe as características de 1º nível do Clérigo, listadas na tabela Características do Clérigo. Veja as regras de multiclasse no capítulo 2 para determinar seus espaços de magia disponíveis.

Disciple of Life.name: Disciple of Life
Disciple of Life.description:
When a spell you cast with a spell slot restores Hit Points to a creature, that creature regains additional Hit Points on the turn you cast the spell. The additional Hit Points equal 2 plus the spell slot's level.

Nota do Foundry

This feature includes a healing activity. Set the scale to the spell slot level you cast and it will provide a healing roll for you.

Divine Intervention.name: Divine Intervention
Divine Intervention.description:
You can call on your deity or pantheon to intervene on your behalf. As a Magic action, choose any @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.SkHptN2PTzFGDaEj]{Cleric spell} of level 5 or lower that doesn't require a Reaction to cast. As part of the same action, you cast that spell without expending a spell slot or needing Material components. You can't use this feature again until you finish a Long Rest.

Nota do Foundry

Uncheck the "Consumption" box when casting the spell for the free use. This feature can be used to track available uses.

Divine Order.name: Ordem Divina
Divine Order.description:
Você se dedicou a um dos seguintes papéis sagrados à sua escolha.

Protetor. Treinado para a batalha, você adquire proficiência com armas Marciais e treinamento com Armadura Pesada.

Taumaturgo. YVocê conhece um truque adicional da @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.SkHptN2PTzFGDaEj]{Lista de magias do clérigo}. Além disso, sua conexão mística com o divino lhe dá um bônus em seus testes de Inteligência (Arcanismo ou Religião). O bônus é igual ao seu modificador de Sabedoria (mínimo de +1).

Nota do Foundry

Ao avançar, você poderá escolher a opção de sua preferência.

Greater Divine Intervention.name: Greater Divine Intervention
Greater Divine Intervention.description:
You can call on even more powerful divine intervention. When you use your Divine Intervention feature, you can choose @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplWish000000]{Wish} when you select a spell. If you do so, you can't use Divine Intervention again until you finish [[/r 2d4]] Long Rests.

Nota do Foundry

This feature will consume a use of your Divine Intervention but it can not automatically recharge the usage after the rolled number of Long Rests.

Improved Blessed Strikes.name: Improved Blessed Strikes
Improved Blessed Strikes.description:
The option you chose for Blessed Strikes grows more powerful.

Divine Strike. The extra damage of your Divine Strike increases to 2d8.

Potent Spellcasting. When you cast a Cleric cantrip and deal damage to a creature with it, you can give vitality to yourself or another creature within 60 feet of yourself, granting a number of Temporary Hit Points equal to twice your Wisdom modifier.

Nota do Foundry

If you chose Divine Strike the damage is automatically increased. If you chose Potent Spellcasting you can use the Potent Spellcasting activity on this feature.

Life Domain.name: Life Domain
Life Domain.description:
Soothe the Hurts of the World

The Life Domain focuses on the positive energy that helps sustain all life in the multiverse. Clerics who tap into this domain are masters of healing, using that life force to cure many hurts.

Existence itself relies on the positive energy associated with this domain, so a Cleric of almost any religious tradition might choose it. This domain is particularly associated with agricultural deities, gods of healing or endurance, and gods of home and community. Religious orders of healing also seek the magic of this domain.

Life Domain Spells.name: Life Domain Spells
Life Domain Spells.description:
Your connection to this divine domain ensures you always have certain spells ready. When you reach a Cleric level specified in the Life Domain Spells table, you thereafter always have the listed spells prepared.

Life Domain Spells
Cleric LevelPrepared Spells

7@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplAuraofLife]{Aura of Life}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDeathWard0]{Death Ward}

Nota do Foundry

These spells are granted automatically as you advance.

Preserve Life.name: Preserve Life
Preserve Life.description:
As a Magic action, you present your Holy Symbol and expend a use of your Channel Divinity to evoke healing energy that can restore a number of Hit Points equal to five times your Cleric level. Choose &Reference[Bloodied] creatures within 30 feet of yourself (which can include you), and divide those Hit Points among them. This feature can restore a creature to no more than half its Hit Point maximum.

Nota do Foundry

The Heal activity does not automatically restrict the HP gained to 50% of the target's max.

Sear Undead.name: Sear Undead
Sear Undead.description:
Whenever you use Turn Undead, you can roll a number of d8s equal to your Wisdom modifier (minimum of 1d8, currently [[lookup @abilities.wis.mod]]) and add the rolls together. Each Undead that fails its saving throw against that use of Turn Undead takes Radiant damage equal to the roll's total. This damage doesn't end the turn effect.

Nota do Foundry

This feature can be used in place of Turn Undead. It consumes a use of Channel Divinity, includes the Save, Active Effects for the conditions, and this feature's damage roll.

Supreme Healing.name: Supreme Healing
Supreme Healing.description:
When you would normally roll one or more dice to restore Hit Points to a creature with a spell or Channel Divinity, don't roll those dice for the healing; instead use the highest number possible for each die. For example, instead of restoring 2d6 Hit Points to a creature with a spell, you restore 12.

Nota do Foundry

This feature does not automate the maximizing of all of your rolls.

Archdruid.name: Archdruid
Archdruid.description:
The vitality of nature constantly blooms within you, granting you the following benefits.

Evergreen Wild Shape. Whenever you roll Initiative and have no uses of Wild Shape left, you regain one expended use of it.

Nature Magician. You can convert uses of Wild Shape into a spell slot (no action required). Choose a number of your unexpended uses of Wild Shape and convert them into a single spell slot, with each use contributing 2 spell levels. For example, if you convert two uses of Wild Shape, you produce a level 4 spell slot. Once you use this benefit, you can't do so again until you finish a Long Rest.

Longevity. The primal magic that you wield causes you to age more slowly. For every ten years that pass, your body ages only one year.

Nota do Foundry

This feature does not automate regaining a use of Wild Shape when rolling initiative but it does include an activity which will restore a use when activated.

The Nature Magician activity can be used to convert Wild Shape uses to spell slots.

Beast Spells.name: Beast Spells
Beast Spells.description: While using Wild Shape, you can cast spells in Beast form, except for any spell that has a Material component with a cost specified or that consumes its Material component.

Circle of the Land.name: Circle of the Land
Circle of the Land.description:
Celebrate Connection to the Natural World

The Circle of the Land comprises mystics and sages who safeguard ancient knowledge and rites. These Druids meet within sacred circles of trees or standing stones to whisper primal secrets in Druidic. The circle's wisest members preside as the chief priests of their communities.

Druid.name: Druida
Druid.description:
Traços Principais do Druida

Atributo Primário

Sabedoria

Dado de Vida

D8 por nível de druida

Proficiências em Salvaguardas

Inteligência e Sabedoria

Proficiências em Perícias

Escolha 2: Arcanismo, Intuição, Lidar com Animais, Medicina, Natureza, Percepção, Religião ou Sobrevivência

Proficiências com Armas

Armas simples

Proficiências com Ferramentas

Kit de herbalismo

Treinamento com Armadura

Armaduras leves e escudos

Equipamento inicial

Escolha A ou B: (A) @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbarmLeatherArm]{Armadura de Couro}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbarmShield0000]{Escudo}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbwepSickle0000]{Foice}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbagDruidicFocu]{Foco Druídico} (@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbwepQuartersta]{Bastão}), @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbagExplorersPa]{Kit de Explorador}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbtulHerbalismK]{Kit de Herbalismo} e [[/award 9GP]]; ou (B) [[/award 50GP]]

@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbAppendixClass.JournalEntryPage.phbdrdDruid00000 inline classes="free-rules-embed"]

Tornando-se um Druida …

Como um Personagem de 1º Nível

  • Ganhe todos os traços da tabela Traços Principais do Druida.
  • Ganhe as características de 1º nível, listadas na tabela Características de Druida.

Como um Personagem Multiclasse

  • Ganhe os seguintes traços da tabela Traços Principais do Druida: Dado de vida e rteinamento com armaduras leves e escudos.
  • Ganhe as características de 1º nível, listadas na tabela Características de Druida. Veja as regras de multiclasse no capítulo 2 para determinar seus espaços de magia disponíveis.

Druidic.name: Druídico
Druidic.description:
Você domina Druídico, o idioma secreto dos Druidas. Ao aprender esse idioma antigo, você também adquiriu a habilidade mágica de se comunicar com animais; você sempre tem a magia @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplSpeakwithA]{falar com animais} preparada.

Você pode usar Druídico para deixar mensagens ocultas. Você e outros que conhecem Druídico identificam automaticamente tal mensagem. Outros podem perceber a presença da mensagem com um teste de [[/check inv 15]], mas não podem decifrá-la sem magia.

Nota do Foundry

Druídico e falar com animais são adicionadas automaticamente durante o avanço.

Elemental Fury.name: Elemental Fury
Elemental Fury.description:
The might of the elements flows through you. You gain one of the following options of your choice.

Potent Spellcasting. Add your Wisdom modifier to the damage you deal with any Druid cantrip.

Primal Strike. Once on each of your turns when you hit a creature with an attack roll using a weapon or a Beast form's attack in Wild Shape, you can cause the target to take an extra 1d8 [[/damage 1d8 type=cold]]{cold}, [[/damage 1d8 type=fire]]{fire}, [[/damage 1d8 type=lightning]]{lightning}, or [[/damage 1d8 type=thunder]]{thunder} damage (choose when you hit).

Nota do Foundry

Você será solicitado a escolher durante o avanço.

Improved Elemental Fury.name: Improved Elemental Fury
Improved Elemental Fury.description:
The option you chose for Elemental Fury grows more powerful, as detailed below.

Potent Spellcasting. When you cast a Druid cantrip with a range of 10 feet or greater, the spell's range increases by 300 feet.

Primal Strike. The extra damage of your Primal Strike increases to 2d8.

Nota do Foundry

The damage for Primal Strike is automatically increased at this level. This feature does not automate the range changes.

Circle of the Land Spells.name: Circle of the Land Spells
Circle of the Land Spells.description:
Whenever you finish a Long Rest, choose one type of land: arid, polar, temperate, or tropical. Consult the table below that corresponds to the chosen type; you have the spells listed for your Druid level and lower prepared.

Nota do Foundry

This feature does not automate swapping between prepared spell options.

Land's Aid.name: Land's Aid
Land's Aid.description:
As a Magic action, you can expend a use of your Wild Shape and choose a point within 60 feet of yourself. Vitality-giving flowers and life-draining thorns appear for a moment in a 10-foot-radius Sphere centered on that point. Each creature of your choice in the Sphere must make a Constitution saving throw against your spell save DC, taking 2d6 Necrotic damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one. One creature of your choice in that area regains [[/healing @scale.land.lands-aid]]{[[lookup @scale.land.lands-aid]] Hit Points}.

The damage and healing increase by 1d6 when you reach Druid levels 10 (3d6) and 14 (4d6).

Nota do Foundry

This feature includes an activity for the saving throw and the healing.

The healing/damage values automatically scale as you level up.

Natural Recovery.name: Natural Recovery
Natural Recovery.description:
You can cast one of the level 1+ spells that you have prepared from your Circle Spells feature without expending a spell slot, and you must finish a Long Rest before you do so again.

In addition, when you finish a Short Rest, you can choose expended spell slots to recover. The spell slots can have a combined level that is equal to or less than half your Druid level (round up, currently [[lookup @classes.druid.levels]]), and none of them can be level 6+. For example, if you're a level 6 Druid, you can recover up to three levels' worth of spell slots. You can recover a level 3 spell slot, a level 2 and a level 1 spell slot, or three level 1 spell slots. Once you recover spell slots with this feature, you can't do so again until you finish a Long Rest.

Nota do Foundry

The Cast Spell activity can be used to track its single free use.

The Recover Spell Slot activity does not automate the restoration of spell slots but can be used for tracking its own single use.

Nature's Sanctuary.name: Nature's Sanctuary
Nature's Sanctuary.description:
As a Magic action, you can expend a use of your Wild Shape and cause spectral trees and vines to appear in a 15-foot Cube on the ground within 120 feet of yourself. They last there for 1 minute or until you have the Incapacitated condition or die. You and your allies have Half Cover while in that area, and your allies gain the current Resistance of your Nature's Ward while there.

As a Bonus Action, you can move the Cube up to 60 feet to ground within 120 feet of yourself.

Nota do Foundry

This feature includes Active Effects for each Nature's Ward land type and adds the Half Cover status effect which automatically applies the relevant bonuses. Apply the relevant effect to your allies.

These Active Effects are not automatically added/removed to/from Actors in the designated area however.

It also includes an activity which can be used for tracking your Bonus Action usage when moving the spectral trees and vines.

Nature's Ward.name: Nature's Ward
Nature's Ward.description:
You are immune to the Poisoned condition, and you have Resistance to a damage type associated with your current land choice in the Circle Spells feature, as shown in the Nature's Ward table.

Nature's Ward
Land TypeResistance
AridFire
PolarCold
TemperateLightning
TropicalPoison

Nota do Foundry

This feature includes an Active Effect for the Poison condition immunity and an Active Effect for each land type. You can activate the Active Effect for your chosen land type.

Primal Order.name: Ordem Primordial
Primal Order.description:
Você se dedicou a uma das seguintes funções sagradas à sua escolha.

Mágico. Você conhece um truque adicional da lista de magias de Druida. Além disso, sua conexão mística com a natureza lhe concede um bônus em seus testes de Inteligência (Arcanismo ou Natureza). O bônus é igual ao seu modificador de Sabedoria (bônus mínimo de +1).

Guarda. Treinado para a batalha, você adquire proficiência com armas Marciais e treinamento com armadura Média.

Nota do Foundry

Você será solicitado a escolher durante o avanço.

Wild Companion.name: Wild Companion
Wild Companion.description:
You can summon a nature spirit that assumes an animal form to aid you. As a Magic action, you can expend a spell slot or a use of Wild Shape to cast the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplFindFamili]{Convocar Familiar} spell without Material components.

When you cast the spell in this way, the familiar is Fey and disappears when you finish a Long Rest.

Nota do Foundry

This feature includes a Summon activity which can be used to summon your wild companion. You can choose whether to expend a use of wild shape or a spell slot when activating it.

The summon does not automatically disappear when you finish a Long Rest.

Wild Resurgence.name: Wild Resurgence
Wild Resurgence.description:
Once on each of your turns, if you have no uses of Wild Shape left, you can give yourself one use by expending a spell slot (no action required).

In addition, you can expend one use of Wild Shape (no action required) to give yourself a level 1 spell slot, but you can't do so again until you finish a Long Rest.

Nota do Foundry

The Regain Wild Shape activity consumes a spell slot and grants you another use of Wild Shape.

The Regain Spell Slot activity will consume a use of Wild Shape and grant you a level 1 spell slot.

Wild Shape.name: Wild Shape
Wild Shape.description:
The power of nature allows you to assume the form of an animal. As a Bonus Action, you shape-shift into a Beast form that you have learned for this feature (see "Known Forms" below). You stay in that form for a number of hours equal to half your Druid level (currently [[lookup @classes.druid.levels]]) or until you use Wild Shape again, have the Incapacitated condition, or die. You can also leave the form early as a Bonus Action.

Number of Uses. You can use Wild Shape twice. You regain one expended use when you finish a Short Rest, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest.

You gain additional uses when you reach certain Druid levels, as shown in the Wild Shape column of the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbDruid00000000.JournalEntryPage.UCOh3zlvGxyk5jLr#class-features]{Características do Druida} table.

Current Number of Uses: [[lookup @scale.druid.wild-shape-uses]]

Known Forms. You know four Beast forms for this feature, chosen from among Beast stat blocks that have a maximum Challenge Rating of 1/4 and that lack a Fly Speed. The @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.actors24.Actor.mmRat00000000000]{Rat}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.actors24.Actor.mmRidingHorse000]{Riding Horse}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.actors24.Actor.mmSpider00000000]{Spider} e @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.actors24.Actor.mmWolf0000000000]{Wolf} são recomendados. Whenever you finish a Long Rest, you can replace one of your known forms with another eligible form.

Wild Shape Automation

When you've selected the creature you would like to wild shape into you can drag it onto your character sheet, select the Wild Shape option, and Foundry will automatically update your sheet. You can revert the transformation at the top of your sheet or by right clicking on your Actor in the sidebar.

When you reach certain Druid levels, your number of known forms and the maximum Challenge Rating for those forms increases, as shown in the Beast Shapes table. In addition, starting at level 8, you can adopt a form that has a Fly Speed.

Current Known Forms Limit: [[lookup @scale.druid.known-forms]]

Current CR Limit: [[lookup @scale.druid.wild-shape]]

When choosing known forms, you may look in the Monster Manual or elsewhere for eligible Beasts if the Dungeon Master permits you to do so.

Beast Shapes
Druid LevelKnown FormsMax CRFly Speed
241/4No
461/2No
881Yes

Rules While Shape-Shifted. While in a form, you retain your personality, memories, and ability to speak, and the following rules apply:

Temporary Hit Points. When you assume a Wild Shape form, you gain a number of Temporary Hit Points equal to your Druid level.

Game Statistics. Your game statistics are replaced by the Beast's stat block, but you retain your creature type; Hit Points; Hit Point Dice; Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma scores; class features; languages; and feats. You also retain your skill and saving throw proficiencies and use your Proficiency Bonus for them, in addition to gaining the proficiencies of the creature. If a skill or saving throw modifier in the Beast's stat block is higher than yours, use the one in the stat block.

No Spellcasting. You can't cast spells, but shape-shifting doesn't break your Concentration or otherwise interfere with a spell you've already cast.

Objects. Your ability to handle objects is determined by the form's limbs rather than your own. In addition, you choose whether your equipment falls in your space, merges into your new form, or is worn by it. Worn equipment functions as normal, but the DM decides whether it's practical for the new form to wear a piece of equipment based on the creature's size and shape. Your equipment doesn't change size or shape to match the new form, and any equipment that the new form can't wear must either fall to the ground or merge with the form. Equipment that merges with the form has no effect while you're in that form.

Nota do Foundry

You can activate this feature to track uses of your Wild Shape.

It will automatically restore a use on a Short Rest and all uses on a Long Rest.

Blessed Warrior.name: Blessed Warrior
Blessed Warrior.description: You learn two @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.SkHptN2PTzFGDaEj#cantrip]{Cleric cantrips} of your choice. @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplGuidance00]{Orientação} e @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplSacredFlam]{Chama Sagrada} são recomendados. The chosen cantrips count as Paladin spells for you, and Charisma is your spellcasting ability for them. Whenever you gain a Paladin level, you can replace one of these cantrips with another Cleric cantrip.

Druidic Warrior.name: Druidic Warrior
Druidic Warrior.description: You learn two @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.LhvuDQEyrCdg5EfU]{Druid cantrips} of your choice. @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplGuidance00]{Orientação} e @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplStarryWisp]{Starry Wisp} são recomendados. The chosen cantrips count as Ranger spells for you, and Wisdom is your spellcasting ability for them. Whenever you gain a Ranger level, you can replace one of these cantrips with another Druid cantrip.

Action Surge.name: Action Surge
Action Surge.description:
You can push yourself beyond your normal limits for a moment. On your turn, you can take one additional action, except the Magic action.

Once you use this feature, you can't do so again until you finish a Short or Long Rest. Starting at level 17, you can use it twice before a rest but only once on a turn.

Nota do Foundry

This feature includes a limited use that increases automatically at level 17.

Additional Fighting Style.name: Additional Fighting Style
Additional Fighting Style.description: You gain another @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbFeats00000000.JournalEntryPage.sbHImaCB8ZMEHYkb]{talento de Estilo de Luta} of your choice.

Champion.name: Champion
Champion.description:
Pursue Physical Excellence in Combat

A Champion focuses on the development of martial prowess in a relentless pursuit of victory. Champions combine rigorous training with physical excellence to deal devastating blows, withstand peril, and garner glory. Whether in athletic contests or bloody battle, Champions strive for the crown of the victor.

Fighter.name: Guerreiro
Fighter.description:
Traços Principais do Guerreiro

Atributo Primário

Força ou Destreza

Dado de Vida

D10 por nível de guerreiro

Proficiências em Salvaguardas

Força e Constituição

Proficiências em Perícias

Escolha 2: Acrobacia, Atletismo, História, Intimidação, Lidar com Animais, Percepção, Persuasão ou Sobrevivência

Proficiências com Armas

Simple and Martial weapons

Treinamento com Armadura

Armaduras leves, médias e pesadas, escudos

Equipamento inicial

Escolha A, B ou C: (A) @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbarmChainMail0]{Cota de Malha}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbwepGreatsword]{Espada Grande}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbwepFlail00000]{Mangual}, 8 @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbwepJavelin000]{Azagaias}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbagDungeoneers]{Kit de Aventureiro} e [[/award 4GP]]; (B) @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbarmStuddedLea]{Armadura de Couro Batido}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbwepScimitar00]{Cimitarra}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbwepShortsword]{Espada Curta}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbwepLongbow000]{Arco Longo}, 20 @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbamoArrows0000]{Flechas}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbagQuiver00000]{Aljava}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbagDungeoneers]{Kit de Aventureiro} e [[/award 11GP]]; or (C) [[/award 155GP]]

@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbAppendixClass.JournalEntryPage.phbftrFighter000 inline classes="free-rules-embed"]

Tornando-se um guerreiro...

Como um Personagem de 1º Nível

  • Ganhe todos os traços da tabela Traços Principais do Guerreiro table.
  • Ganhe as características de 1º nível de guerreiro, que estão listadas na Tabela Características de Guerreiro.

Como um Personagem Multiclasse

  • Ganhe as seguintes características da tabela Traços Principais do Guerreiro table: Dado de vida, proficiência com armas marciais e treinamento com armaduras leves, médias e escudos.
  • Ganhe as características de 1º nível de guerreiro, que estão listadas na Tabela Características de Guerreiro.

Fighting Style.name: Estilo de Luta
Fighting Style.description:
You gain a @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbFeats00000000.JournalEntryPage.sbHImaCB8ZMEHYkb]{talento de Estilo de Luta} of your choice. Instead of choosing one of those feats, you can choose the option below.

@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.classes24.Item.phbfstDruidicWar caption=false]

Heroic Warrior.name: Heroic Warrior
Heroic Warrior.description: The thrill of battle drives you toward victory. During combat, you can give yourself Heroic Inspiration whenever you start your turn without it.

Improved Critical.name: Improved Critical
Improved Critical.description:
Your attack rolls with weapons and Unarmed Strikes can score a Critical Hit on a roll of 19 or 20 on the d20.

Nota do Foundry

This feature automatically increases the Critical Hit threshold to 19.

Indomitable.name: Indomitable
Indomitable.description:
If you fail a saving throw, you can reroll it with a bonus equal to your Fighter level (currently, [[lookup @classes.fighter.levels]]). You must use the new roll, and you can't use this feature again until you finish a Long Rest.

You can use this feature twice before a Long Rest starting at level 13 and three times before a Long Rest starting at level 17.

Nota do Foundry

This feature's maximum usages scale automatically as you level up.

Remarkable Athlete.name: Remarkable Athlete
Remarkable Athlete.description:
Thanks to your athleticism, you have Advantage on Initiative rolls and Strength (Athletics) checks.

In addition, immediately after you score a Critical Hit, you can move up to half your Speed without provoking Opportunity Attacks.

Nota do Foundry

This feature automatically grants Advantage on Initiative rolls.

Second Wind.name: Recuperar Fôlego
Second Wind.description:
Você tem uma reserva limitada de resistência física e mental que pode usar. Como uma Ação Bônus, você pode usá-la para recuperar Pontos de Vida iguais a 1d10 mais seu nível de Guerreiro.

Você pode usar essa característica duas vezes. Você recupera um uso gasto quando completa um Descanso Curto e restaura todos os usos gastos quando completa um Descanso Longo.

Ao atingir certos níveis de Guerreiro, você adquire mais usos dessa característica, conforme mostrado na coluna Recuperar Fôlego da tabela @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbFighter000000.JournalEntryPage.wDELe3k25FQvYdrq#class-features]{Características de Guerreiro}.

Nota do Foundry

Esse recurso ajusta automaticamente o número de usos e restaura o número correto de usos após um Descanso Curto e um Descanso Longo.

Studied Attacks.name: Studied Attacks
Studied Attacks.description:
You study your opponents and learn from each attack you make. If you make an attack roll against a creature and miss, you have Advantage on your next attack roll against that creature before the end of your next turn.

Nota do Foundry

This feature does not automate the Advantage on your next attack roll.

Superior Critical.name: Superior Critical
Superior Critical.description:
Your attack rolls with weapons and Unarmed Strikes can now score a Critical Hit on a roll of 18–20 on the d20.

Nota do Foundry

This feature automatically increases the Critical Hit threshold to 18.

Survivor.name: Survivor
Survivor.description:
You attain the pinnacle of resilience in battle, giving you these benefits.

Defy Death. You have Advantage on Death Saving Throws. Moreover, when you roll 18–20 on a Death Saving Throw, you gain the benefit of rolling a 20 on it.

Heroic Rally. At the start of each of your turns, you regain Hit Points equal to 5 plus your Constitution modifier if you are Bloodied and have at least 1 Hit Point.

Nota do Foundry

This feature does not automate the Death Saving Throw changes. It includes an activity for healing but does not automatically add it when you are Bloodied.

Tactical Master.name: Tactical Master
Tactical Master.description: When you attack with a weapon whose mastery property you can use, you can replace that property with the Push, Sap, or Slow property for that attack.

Tactical Mind.name: Tactical Mind
Tactical Mind.description: You have a mind for tactics on and off the battlefield. When you fail an ability check, you can expend a use of your Second Wind to push yourself toward success. Rather than regaining Hit Points, you roll 1d10 and add the number rolled to the ability check, potentially turning it into a success. If the check still fails, this use of Second Wind isn't expended.

Tactical Shift.name: Tactical Shift
Tactical Shift.description: Whenever you activate your Second Wind with a Bonus Action, you can move up to half your Speed without provoking Opportunity Attacks.

Three Extra Attacks.name: Three Extra Attacks
Three Extra Attacks.description: You can attack four times instead of once whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

Two Extra Attacks.name: Two Extra Attacks
Two Extra Attacks.description: You can attack three times instead of once whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

Agonizing Blast.name: Agonizing Blast
Agonizing Blast.description:
Prerequisite: Level 2+ Warlock, a Warlock Cantrip That Deals Damage

Choose one of your known Warlock cantrips that deals damage. You can add your Charisma modifier to that spell's damage rolls.

Repeatable. You can gain this invocation more than once. Each time you do so, choose a different eligible cantrip.

Nota do Foundry

The change to your cantrip will have to be made manually by adding "@abilities.cha.mod" to the "Bonus" field of your spell's damage.

Armor of Shadows.name: Armor of Shadows
Armor of Shadows.description:
You can cast @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplMageArmor0]{Armadura Arcana} on yourself without expending a spell slot.

Nota do Foundry

The Mage Armor activity is configured with the spell's effect and duration, including an Active Effect to set the spell's provided AC formula.

Mage Armor.name: Armadura Arcana
Mage Armor.description: A CA base do alvo se torna 13 mais o modificador de Destreza dele.

Ascendant Step.name: Ascendant Step
Ascendant Step.description:
Prerequisite: Level 5+ Warlock

You can cast @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplLevitate00]{Levitate} on yourself without expending a spell slot.

Levitating.name: Levitating
Levitating.description: The target can move only by pushing or pulling against a fixed object or surface within reach (such as a wall or a ceiling), which allows it to move as if it were climbing.

Devil's Sight.name: Devil's Sight
Devil's Sight.description:
Prerequisite: Level 2+ Warlock

You can see normally in Dim Light and Darkness—both magical and nonmagical—within 120 feet of yourself.

Nota do Foundry

This feature includes an Active Effect that grants you darkvision to 120 feet.

Devouring Blade.name: Devouring Blade
Devouring Blade.description:
Prerequisite: Level 12+ Warlock, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.classes24.Item.phbinvThirstingB]{Thirsting Blade} Invocation

The Extra Attack of your Thirsting Blade invocation confers two extra attacks rather than one.

Eldritch Mind.name: Eldritch Mind
Eldritch Mind.description: You have Advantage on Constitution saving throws that you make to maintain Concentration.

Eldritch Smite.name: Eldritch Smite
Eldritch Smite.description:
Prerequisite: Level 5+ Warlock, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.classes24.Item.phbinvPactBlade0]{Pact of the Blade} Invocation

Once per turn when you hit a creature with your pact weapon, you can expend a Pact Magic spell slot to deal an extra 1d8 Force damage to the target, plus another 1d8 per level of the spell slot, and you can give the target the &Reference[Prone] condition if it is Huge or smaller.

Nota do Foundry

The Smite activity consumes a Pact Magic spell slot and increases the damage based on your pact spell level.

Eldritch Spear.name: Eldritch Spear
Eldritch Spear.description:
Prerequisite: Level 2+ Warlock, a Warlock Cantrip That Deals Damage

Choose one of your known Warlock cantrips that deals damage and has a range of 10+ feet. When you cast that spell, its range increases by a number of feet equal to 30 times your Warlock level.

Repetível. You can gain this invocation more than once. Each time you do so, choose a different eligible cantrip.

Nota do Foundry

Use the Increase Range enchantment activity and drag your chosen cantrip to the chat card to increase its range and append ", Eldritch Spear" for easier identification.

Fiendish Vigor.name: Fiendish Vigor
Fiendish Vigor.description:
Prerequisite: Level 2+ Warlock

You can cast @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplFalseLife0]{False Life} on yourself without expending a spell slot. When you cast the spell with this feature, you don't roll the die for the Temporary Hit Points; you automatically get the highest number on the die.

Nota do Foundry

The False Life activity includes the maximum amount of healing.

Gaze of Two Minds.name: Gaze of Two Minds
Gaze of Two Minds.description:
Prerequisite: Level 5+ Warlock

You can use a Bonus Action to touch a willing creature and perceive through its senses until the end of your next turn. As long as the creature is on the same plane of existence as you, you can take a Bonus Action on subsequent turns to maintain this connection, extending the duration until the end of your next turn. The connection ends if you don't maintain it in this way.

While perceiving through the other creature's senses, you benefit from any special senses possessed by that creature, and you can cast spells as if you were in your space or the other creature's space if the two of you are within 60 feet of each other.

Gift of the Depths.name: Gift of the Depths
Gift of the Depths.description:
Prerequisite: Level 5+ Warlock

You can breathe underwater, and you gain a Swim Speed equal to your Speed.

You can also cast @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplWaterBreat]{Water Breathing} once without expending a spell slot. You regain the ability to cast it in this way again when you finish a Long Rest.

Nota do Foundry

The Gift Water Breathing activity consumes a limited use and includes an Active Effect for tracking the chosen creatures.

Gift of the Protectors.name: Gift of the Protectors
Gift of the Protectors.description:
Prerequisite: Level 9+ Warlock, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.classes24.Item.phbinvPactTome00]{Pact of the Tome} Invocation

A new page appears in your @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.items.Item.CwWbeQ6XyqFzbMYw]{Book of Shadows} when you conjure it. With your permission, a creature can take an action to write its name on that page, which can contain a number of names equal to your Charisma modifier (minimum of one name).

When any creature whose name is on the page is reduced to 0 Hit Points but not killed outright, the creature magically drops to 1 Hit Point instead. Once this magic is triggered, no creature can benefit from it until you finish a Long Rest.

As a Magic action, you can erase a name on the page by touching it.

Nota do Foundry

The Protect activity consumes a use of its activity which refreshes every Long Rest.

The Write Name activity consumes a use of the item which can be used for tracking how many names you've written down.

The Erase Name activity will restore a use of the item and allows you to add another name.

Investment of the Chain Master.name: Investment of the Chain Master
Investment of the Chain Master.description:
Prerequisite: Level 5+ Warlock, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.classes24.Item.phbinvPactChain0]{Pact of the Chain} Invocation

When you cast @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplFindFamili]{Convocar Familiar}, you infuse the summoned familiar with a measure of your eldritch power, granting the creature the following benefits.

Aerial or Aquatic. The familiar gains either a Fly Speed or a Swim Speed (your choice) of 40 feet.

Quick Attack. As a Bonus Action, you can command the familiar to take the Attack action.

Necrotic or Radiant Damage. Whenever the familiar deals Bludgeoning, Piercing, or Slashing damage, you can make it deal Necrotic or Radiant damage instead.

Your Save DC. If the familiar forces a creature to make a saving throw, it uses your spell save DC.

Resistance. When the familiar takes damage, you can take a Reaction to grant it Resistance against that damage.

Nota do Foundry

The Find Familiar with Flight and with Swimming activities both allow you to summon a familiar with the relevant movement bonus. Both activities consume a Pact Magic spell slot.

The Invest with Resistance activity includes an Active Effect for resisting each type of damage which can be applied to get the relevant resistance. Be sure you disable/delete the previous Active Effect in the "Effects" tab of your sheet when you change Resistances.

The familiar automatically uses your Save DC.

Lessons of the First Ones.name: Lessons of the First Ones
Lessons of the First Ones.description:
Prerequisite: Level 2+ Warlock

You have received knowledge from an elder entity of the multiverse, allowing you to gain one @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbFeats00000000.JournalEntryPage.otAeQs0TLHYIBNuj]{Origin feat} of your choice.

Repeatable. You can gain this invocation more than once. Each time you do so, choose a different Origin feat.

Lifedrinker.name: Lifedrinker
Lifedrinker.description:
Prerequisite: Level 9+ Warlock, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.classes24.Item.phbinvPactBlade0]{Pact of the Blade} Invocation

Once per turn when you hit a creature with your pact weapon, you can deal an extra 1d6 Necrotic, Psychic, or Radiant damage (your choice) to the creature, and you can expend one of your Hit Point Dice to roll it and regain a number of Hit Points equal to the roll plus your Constitution modifier (minimum of 1 Hit Point).

Nota do Foundry

The Damage activity allows you to choose the type of damage in the roll's dialog. It will remember your choice going forward.

The Heal (Largest Hit Die) and Smallest Hit Die activities expends the relevant Hit Die and provides a healing roll with your Constitution modifier included. Which you choose only matters if you are multi-classed with multiple hit die types.

Mask of Many Faces.name: Mask of Many Faces
Mask of Many Faces.description:
Prerequisite: Level 2+ Warlock

You can cast @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDisguiseSe]{Disguise Self} without expending a spell slot.

Nota do Foundry

The Cast activity can be used in-place of Disguise Self and includes an Active Effect for tracking when you are disguised.

Disguised.name: Disguised
Disguised.description: To discern that you are disguised, a creature must take the Study action to inspect your appearance and succeed on an [[/check ability=int skill=inv]] check against your spell save DC.

Master of Myriad Forms.name: Master of Myriad Forms
Master of Myriad Forms.description:
Prerequisite: Level 5+ Warlock

You can cast @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplAlterSelf0]{Alter Self} without expending a spell slot.

Nota do Foundry

This feature includes Alter Self's activities.

The Aquatic Adaptation, Change Appearance, and Natural Weapons activities include Active Effects for tracking your choice and require Concentration.

The Attack activities can be used for your attack/damage rolls when you choose the Natural Weapons option.

Aquatic Adaptation.name: Aquatic Adaptation
Aquatic Adaptation.description: You can breathe underwater and gain a Swim Speed equal to your Speed.

Natural Weapon.name: Natural Weapon
Natural Weapon.description: When you use your Unarmed Strike to deal damage with that new growth, it deals 1d6 damage of the type in parentheses instead of dealing the normal damage for your Unarmed Strike, and you use your spellcasting ability modifier for the attack and damage rolls rather than using Strength.

Misty Visions.name: Misty Visions
Misty Visions.description:
Prerequisite: Level 2+ Warlock

You can cast @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplSilentImag]{Silent Image} without expending a spell slot.

Nota do Foundry

This feature includes Silent Image's activities and can be used in its place.

One with Shadows.name: One with Shadows
One with Shadows.description:
Prerequisite: Level 5+ Warlock

While you're in an area of &Reference[Dim Light] or &Reference[Darkness], you can cast @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplInvisibili]{Invisibility} on yourself without expending a spell slot.

Nota do Foundry

The Cast activity can be used in place of the Invisibility spell and includes an Active Effect that sets the Invisible status effect.

Invisible.name: Invisível
Invisible.description: The spell ends early immediately after the target makes an attack roll, deals damage, or casts a spell.

Otherworldly Leap.name: Otherworldly Leap
Otherworldly Leap.description:
Prerequisite: Level 2+ Warlock

You can cast @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplJump000000]{Jump} on yourself without expending a spell slot.

Nota do Foundry

This feature can be used in place of the Jump spell and includes an Active Effect for tracking.

Jump.name: Jump
Jump.description: Once on each of its turns until the spell ends, that creature can jump up to 30 feet by spending 10 feet of movement.

Pact of the Blade.name: Pact of the Blade
Pact of the Blade.description:
As a Bonus Action, you can conjure a pact weapon in your hand—a Simple or Martial Melee weapon of your choice with which you bond—or create a bond with a magic weapon you touch; you can't bond with a magic weapon if someone else is attuned to it or another Warlock is bonded with it. Until the bond ends, you have proficiency with the weapon, and you can use it as a Spellcasting Focus.

Whenever you attack with the bonded weapon, you can use your Charisma modifier for the attack and damage rolls instead of using Strength or Dexterity; and you can cause the weapon to deal Necrotic, Psychic, or Radiant damage or its normal damage type.

Your bond with the weapon ends if you use this feature's Bonus Action again, if the weapon is more than 5 feet away from you for 1 minute or more, or if you die. A conjured weapon disappears when the bond ends.

Pact of the Chain.name: Pacto da Corrente
Pact of the Chain.description:
